TextENGNew: The same day, Saeki General Hospital.
I didn't have great memories of this hospital rooftop.
The sunset sky was truly beautiful. I could hear the cry of the higurashi off in the distance, and the soft wind washed away all my thoughts as it blew across my cheeks, leaving me content.
However...
"Sis."
Thanks to this lovely scenery... I couldn't help but think back to that time.
To that girl who was always following me around...
"We sure talked about a lot of things sitting on this bench, didn't we...?"
I gently caressed the bench. The paint was peeling off due to weather exposure.
...As I sat my crutches down next to the bench, I thought back to the old days.
Nobody would believe it... but originally, I didn't enjoy being such an extrovert. Sitting somewhere quietly seemed like a better way to rest and relax.
...The reason I decided to try and get better at talking with others... was because I managed to make her laugh.
She was such a good listener. She always listened carefully, and she laughed so much when I finished my stories. That's why I put in the effort to get better at talking to other people.
...Really, I loved it.
She was so honest, so cheerful... and she always believed in me. My little sister, Kaori.
I'd give anything just to see her smile.
I believed that I could do anything, if it would make her happy.
But... I betrayed that trust.
For all the things I said and thought in my heart, when it came time to act I hesitated to keep my word...
"...Who were they calling Chii-chan the High-spirited?@k@vS08/37/320300314. Idiot."
When I thought back on it, convincing myself that I took immediate action... was a downright lie.
Deep down, I was an indecisive coward.
...Really, it's ironic.
Even though she was born into a doctor's family, nobody noticed that Kaori had a serious illness until her condition progressed to life-threatening levels.
The fact that she was so patient and tolerant might have worked against her, too.
At any rate, Kaori suddenly collapsed one day and was brought in for an examination. Then, the doctors gave us the worst possible prognosis...
However, there was still a way to save her. ...Indeed, there was still something we could do for her.
"...Transplanting?@k@vS08/37/320300316. My bone marrow?"

"Yes.@k@vS08/00/VT2B_saekiF1002. Your mother and I are unable to do so because we don't match, but your blood is an HLA match for Kaori's, so you're able to become a donor.@k@vS08/00/VT2B_saekiF1003. ...Are you willing to do this for Kaori?"

"It'll be fine.@k@vS08/00/VT2B_saekiF1005. For both you and Kaori. I'll have my most trusted surgeons at the hospital handle the procedure.@k@vS08/00/VT2B_saekiF1006. It won't have any negative effects on your body."
Dad tried to encourage me... but I was still young. I was terrified of what would happen if they cut me open. I was scared out of my mind.
Plus, I was the daughter of the hospital director, so I had seen my fair share of material about medical accidents in the news.
Even if it was for Kaori, even in our own hospital, as long as there was a non-zero chance of failure I just couldn't bring myself to say "Yes" right then and there...
I said that I needed time to think... and I avoided giving them an immediate answer.
(Unfortunately, Kaori's health suddenly worsened immediately after that...)
They rushed to prepare for transplant surgery... but by then, it was already too late.
There was nothing left to do... When Kaori held my hand between both of her little hands, I felt like my hand was being crushed by a mountain of guilt and regret.
And then,
"Sis...@k@vS08/00/VT2B_kaori1003. When I get out of this hospital, I hope you and I can share a cake together..."
...Those were her last words.
After that, she wouldn't reply, no matter how much I called out... Her little hands were still firmly wrapped around my hand, and never moved again...

"...D-doctor!!@k@vS08/37/320300321. I, I'll do anything!@k@vS08/37/320300322. She can have my blood, or my heart, take anything you need!!@k@vS08/37/320300323. So please, bring Kaori back!!@k@vS08/37/320300324. Please!!@k@vS08/37/320300325. Please...!!"
I desperately cried out to the doctors standing beside me and clung to them, not caring who it was...
I knew that it was already too late, but I just didn't want to admit it...
Even after we laid Kaori to rest, I never stopped apologizing to her.
"I'm sorry... I'm sorry...@k@vS08/37/320300327. I'm sorry... I'm sorry... I'm sorry...!!"
No matter how much I begged for forgiveness, I knew I'd never be forgiven... and I knew there was nothing I could do to make up for this...
A moment of hesitation created an eternity of regret... and for the longest time, I was unable to accept that.
So... I directed my burning anger and hatred toward the doctors and my parents, who couldn't do anything to help Kaori.
If only they had noticed Kaori's condition earlier.
If only they tried harder to encourage me to go along with the operation.
Then I wouldn't have made the wrong decision, and Kaori wouldn't have died...
Thanks to that... I lashed out around me with selfish behavior for a while to clear up the melancholy in my raging heart... Rage I could hardly believe looking back on it now.
The arrogant and cruel daughter of the hospital director. ...That's who I was back then.
From the bottom of my heart, I believed that this absurd world and this fate were miserable, detestable, and depressing...
I understood the truth, though. Honestly, the mistake was all mine, and I just refused to accept it.
Tamako and Akira were probably the only ones who knew the truth.
If I hadn't met Mamoru-senpai... and hadn't been admonished by my parents so many times, there's no way I could have crawled up from the bottom of that abyss...
"...It's been six years since then."
I gently touched the handrail on the iron fence.
...Back then, I couldn't reach it even if I held my hand all the way out. But now, I'm even able to rest my elbow on it.
Even so, it still felt like it was only yesterday, like time hadn't advanced at all for me.
Indeed. ...I was still as indecisive as ever.
Even though I knew it was pointless, I thought back.
The moment I learned that Natsumi was from Hinamizawa, I should have offered her a helping hand... but in the end, I couldn't do it.
If I had done that, Natsumi might not have been driven so far over the edge.

Even when she attacked me in front of the care center. If I had told the detectives immediately that Natsumi was the attacker... she would've been arrested before she had the chance to cause that tragic incident at home.
It was all... because I took too long to make a decision.
It was unmistakably me, her friend, who drove her into that misery...
"...Her friend, huh?"
Then, what could I do for her as a friend?
From then on... I kept thinking about that.
In the first place, what does it mean to be kind as a friend?
To create a fun and happy space?
To lend a hand when you're in trouble?
In that case... I probably should have done that for her.
Of course, it might be ridiculously conceited of me to think that. ...Still, if I was lacking something as a friend, then what in the world was it?
Just how much did I have to do to become her friend...?
".......@k@vS08/37/320300332. That doesn't sound right..."
Is becoming a friend something you consciously attempt to do in the first place?
Doesn't it just happen on its own when you come to an understanding and feel comfortable with someone else?
If you like each other and understand each other, then naturally...
"Aah, I see..."
I... understood. I finally understood.
Though it might already be too late... I realized what I was lacking.
In the end, I liked to believe I knew her, but I never put in the effort to get to know her even better...
"...Though it's all too late by this point.@k@vS08/37/320300335. But... huh?"
The next moment...
I heard the loud echo of the roof access door being opened.
Looking back to see who it was... I instantly froze.
Standing right there, was...
"Natsumi..."
No doubt, the person standing there... was Natsumi Kimiyoshi.
"Natsumi, why...?"
Why did she come here?
No... how was she able to come here?
I began to throw those natural questions toward Natsumi. Then,
Slowly.
Natsumi had a cold expression as she slowly approached with her right hand hidden behind her back, then lifted it above her head.
In her hand... she was holding a dimly glinting knife...
"Natsu... mi...?!"
"Ehehehehe, hehehehehehehehehe.@k@vS08/36/320100533. Ahahahahahahaha, ahahahahahahahahahahaha."
Natsumi let out a terrible laugh as she locked the door behind her with her other hand.
The rooftop door was different from the other rooms. It required a key to open from inside. I also heard the key was recently lost and they were still waiting to receive a spare.
That meant... this rooftop was essentially a closed room.
"...I see."
Natsumi felt animosity.
For her family, who gave her the shackles and the sin known as Hinamizawa.
And... for me, who she believed was trying to take away the man she loved, Akira, all the while knowing about her Hinamizawan heritage...
Natsumi herself eliminated her parents and grandmother the other day.
In other words, I was the only one left...
"...What's wrong?@k@vS08/36/320100535. Aren't you going to run away?@k@vS08/36/320100536. Aren't you going to call for help?"
"Where... would I run away to?@k@vS08/37/320300342. And who would I ask for help...?"
With cold sweat dripping down my entire body... I answered with a bitter smile.
I felt a shocking lack of danger... Perhaps somewhere in my heart, I had been expecting this to happen.
"...You don't look surprised.@k@vS08/36/320100538. That I've come here to kill you, I mean.@k@vS08/36/320100539. Then... I assume you know why?"
"...I feel partly responsible for driving you so far off the edge.@k@vS08/37/320300344. So I'm not okay with the idea of you killing me, but I can understand why."
"...However, if you'll allow me to ask, just what are you planning to do after you kill me?"
"Teehehehe... Who knows?@k@vS08/36/320100541. I haven't thought that far ahead."
"You say "far ahead", but no matter how you calculate it, that future's not even 10 minutes away.@k@vS08/37/320300347. It's right now."
"Shut up!!!"
The birds standing on the fence scattered when they heard that shout, and the higurashi fell silent for a moment.
Natsumi suddenly bore her fangs as she cried out in anger.
But... why?
Unlike before, I didn't feel an ounce of fear.
Was it because I was prepared to pay for my sins?
Was it because I had chosen to walk down the road to oblivion together with her?
...Sorry, but that's wrong.
Right. ...That's my answer.
I won't run away anymore.
I've had enough of flinching and hesitating only to be left with a lifetime of regret, like I did with Kaori.
If this is my fate... I'll have to accept it as it is.
I was prepared for that. ...So even when faced with this vastly different Natsumi... I wasn't afraid.
"You betrayed me!@k@vS08/36/320100544. I believed... I believed that you were my friend, but you betrayed me and tried to sabotage my relationship with Toudou-kun!!"
"And you sold me out to the police!!@k@vS08/36/320100546. That's unforgivable! Unforgivable...!!"
Certainly... there was no point arguing the latter.

When I told the police about Natsumi's attack, they went to investigate... And they arrived on the scene right as she murdered her parents, so they apprehended her before she had an opportunity to escape.
So maybe, if I had kept quiet, she might've been able to conceal the crime of killing her parents.
But... even if she managed to hide it, what future did she have after that?
No matter how hard she tried to maintain the lie, it would be impossible to keep the truth hidden forever.
So, in the end... Natsumi's criticism was probably misplaced.
But she had a selfish mindset, wanting to push the blame for her current situation onto someone...
"...What's wrong?@k@vS08/36/320100548. Are you feeling so guilty you can't even speak?@k@vS08/36/320100549. So scared you can't even cry?"

"Ahahahahaha, it's already too late though.@k@vS08/36/320100551. No matter how much you apologize and repent under the weight of your sins, I will never forgive you...!@k@vS08/36/320100552. Ahahahahahaha, ahahahahahaha...!!"
"...Who the hell would apologize, moron?@k@vS08/37/320300350. You should go cool off and come back later."
Surprised,
Natsumi's eyes opened wide for a moment... but she quickly recovered her original coldness.
Nevertheless, a faintly unpleasant look appeared on her face. ...It was clear she hadn't expected me to talk back.
"You think I betrayed you?@k@vS08/37/320300352. Hmph, I'll turn those words right back on you."
"You're the one who betrayed us first, Natsumi."

"Keeping the fact that you were from Hinamizawa hidden, sneaking around, never making up your mind...@k@vS08/37/320300355. It made me sick just watching it.@k@vS08/37/320300356. Quit telling those crappy lies and getting drunk on the notion you're some sort of tragic heroine, you bookworm."
Yeah... that's right.
I'll resign myself to my fate. I won't hesitate.
But... I needed to fulfill my obligations as a friend at least at the very end, so I turned to Natsumi.
"Besides, facing discrimination for where you lived? What century do you think we're in?"
"I'm sorry, but I didn't know anything about this Hinamizawa place until the disaster struck, and I wasn't interested.@k@vS08/37/320300359. Because I was born and raised in this town."
"And yet you get it in your head that I look down on country folk just because I boast about my town...@k@vS08/37/320300361. What's wrong with being proud of your own town?"
"Your own sense of inferiority drove you to believe I was making a fool of you.@k@vS08/37/320300363. Enough with the persecution complex, you dumbass!"

"Shut uuup!!@k@vS08/36/320100556. ...No matter what excuses you make, it's a fact that you betrayed me about Toudou-kun!@k@vS08/36/320100557. You sent me to a different college because you were trying to split us apart, right?!"

"Excuse me?@k@vS08/37/320300365. Use that brain of yours and remember. You chose Misaki University entirely on your own, didn't you?@k@vS08/37/320300366. I suggested Rikuo University too, but you gave up on it because you thought you couldn't get in with your current grades!"

"Don't play dumb!@k@vS08/36/320100559. Toudou-kun was going to Rikuo University... and you were going too. If you had told me, I wouldn't have given up so quickly!@k@vS08/36/320100560. You manipulated me into doing that. You can't push that responsibility off on me!!"

"...Aah, that only happened by chance. It couldn't be helped.@k@vS08/37/320300368. Rikuo University has been my first choice for the longest time.@k@vS08/37/320300369. Didn't I tell you?@k@vS08/37/320300370. I'm certain I told you. I remember."

"And, it was a coincidence that Akira applied there too. He submitted his application long after I did, ok?@k@vS08/37/320300372. In that case, wouldn't it be more accurate to say that Akira betrayed you?"
"Liar!!@k@vS08/36/320100562. You seduced him!!"

"Huh? ...Hahahah!@k@vS08/37/320300377. Just how stupid can you even get?@k@vS08/37/320300375. If his heart were so easily swayed, how can you expect things to go well between you two in the future?!@k@vS08/37/320300376. In case you didn't know, half the people on the planet are women, alright?"
"No matter how much you try to cover his eyes and keep the other girls away, there will always be plenty of people out there to tempt him!"
"Even in those situations, it's your basic obligation as his girlfriend to ensure he doesn't fall prey to that, right?!"
"Gh... y-you bitch...!!"
"What's wrong?@k@vS08/37/320300380. If you're pissed off, then come right at..."
Before I could finish that sentence, Natsumi rushed at me with the kitchen knife in hand.
...My body stiffened for a moment, but still, she was acting out of an emotional outburst so her movements were straightforward and easy to predict.
I just barely moved my upper body to the side to evade her attack, and tripped her with my leg.
Natsumi stumbled forward, carried away by her sheer momentum. I staggered for a moment to regain my footing, but managed to maintain my position and turn around.
"Come on, you demon, what's wrong?@k@vS08/37/320300383. The Chii-chan you hate so much is right over here~."
Natsumi rose to her feet in a fit of rage, then slashed with the kitchen knife two, three times in a wide arc.
The tip grazed my clothes and left a red streak along my skin... However, that left her exposed, so I countered by grabbing her outstretched arm and used that force to send her flying.
Then, she coughed when she struck the ground. I pulled her up by the collar and then used a judo throw to drop her to the ground!
"Aaagh?!"
Then, once more...!
"Ugh?!"
After suffering the pain of being thrown to the ground three times, Natsumi finally loosened her grip on the knife.
The moment I noticed that opportunity, I stomped on her wrist with all the strength in my entire body. Then I kicked the weapon as far away as I could.
"Don't underestimate me...!@k@vS08/37/320300385. I have plenty of experience.@k@vS08/37/320300386. Did you think I'd freeze up just because you were swinging a knife around?"
"A delicate person like you won't stand a chance!"

Pressing the attack with the momentum I built up, I pushed Natsumi down on her back and straddled her like a horse, then grabbed her by the collar again. Her eyes widened with pain and humiliation as she desperately struggled to escape my grip.

"...Besides, what's all this crap about me betraying you?@k@vS08/37/320300389. That we're not friends?@k@vS08/37/320300390. This "trust" you go on about is like expecting someone to do whatever you ask. That's your definition of a friend?!"
"Then I hate to break it to you!@k@vS08/37/320300392. But I'm an honest person who won't hesitate to turn down any favors I don't like, who will throw down complaints and opinions anytime!!"
"Ghh... guh... Ghaaa!!"
"Also, it's fine for you to get mad when things don't go your way. But then, what did you do for us?"
"What did you do to repay us?@k@vS08/37/320300394. Can you say you did?@k@vS08/37/320300396. You can't, can you?!"
"You never told us what was truly on your mind, played the good girl for your own satisfaction, and feigned ignorance around us. Is that what you call a friend?! Huh?!"
"What do you...!!@k@vS08/36/320100575. ...What do you even know about me?!"
Hmph! ...There we go, the old "woe is me" habit!
That she brings up specious circumstances as an excuse to put herself on a pedestal and disregard the people around her?
...All right. If it's come to this, I'll tell her how I honestly feel...!!

"Yeah, I don't know you!@k@vS08/37/320300399. I don't want to know!@k@vS08/37/320300400. Maybe out in that country of yours, you can tell what everyone else is thinking through harmonizing, but unfortunately for you, I'm not a psychologist, and I'm not psychic!"
"Unless you directly tell me how you feel, I'll never understand!!"
"It's because you always depend on others like that!! That's why you'll always be treated like a country bumpkin and an outsider in this town no matter how much time passes!!"
"Y-youuuuuu!!!"
That moment, Natsumi sunk her teeth deep into my hand. Frightened, I pulled my hand back, only for her to aim for my forehead and headbutt me.
"Guh?!"
In the moment I was dazed by that strike, Natsumi pushed me away.

...Then, when I managed to scramble to my feet, I saw Natsumi off in the distance picking up the knife that I kicked away earlier. And then, she turned toward me with her rage flaring up brighter than before.
"Hee, hehe...!@k@vS08/37/320300405. S-so, you really can do it if you try. Just what I'd expected from someone who grew up in the country..."
I wiped away the sweat running down my forehead with the back of my hand.
...When I looked at the sleeve of my pajamas, I noticed it was covered in reddish black spots. Apparently, I'd been fighting so hard that I reopened my wound, the blood now mixing with my sweat.
(...Seriously... what gangster movie have I found myself in?)
Though, those usually result in manly fistfights. ...Come to think of it, I don't think I've seen many of those fights between two girls.
I grabbed one of the crutches I had set down next to the bench, and held it up with both hands to block the knife.
When Natsumi saw that, she pulled back for a moment to assess the situation... but shortly thereafter, she let out a bold laugh with a twisted expression on her face.
"...Ah, ahahahaha... ahahahahaha...!!"
"...What's so funny?"
"Just as I thought...!@k@vS08/36/320100579. You're a liar, after all...!"
"You're willing to hit me and throw me around. You hate me so much that you want to hurt me!@k@vS08/36/320100581. So how dare you pretend to be my friend all this tiiiiiiiime!!"

"Oh, is that right?!@k@vS08/37/320300410. You're free to think whatever the hell you want!@k@vS08/37/320300411. ...But then, what about you?@k@vS08/37/320300412. Even though I thought we were friends, here you are swinging a knife at me!!"
"You think we're friends?!@k@vS08/36/320100583. I hate you... despise you!!@k@vS08/36/320100584. I've hated you ever since we first met!!!"
"Hmph!@k@vS08/37/320300414. The things you're saying don't add up..."
"If you hated me so much, why did you talk to me in the first place?@k@vS08/37/320300416. Why didn't you reject me right away?"
"You used to love being alone, didn't you?!@k@vS08/37/320300418. I would've left you alone just like you wanted if you turned me away from the start, so why?!"
"Shut uuuup!!!"

"You get it now, Natsumi?!@k@vS08/37/320300420. Maybe you're right about me, but you're just as much of a liar!!@k@vS08/37/320300421. Lying to yourself, making up facts as it suits you!!@k@vS08/37/320300422. It seriously pisses me off how much you're like my old self!!"
"Liar... liar!!@k@vS08/36/320100587. How can you say you're the same as me? You've been blessed with everythiiing!!"

"Blessed?!@k@vS08/37/320300424. ...Fine, then let me ask you this: have you ever tasted true despair?@k@vS08/37/320300425. Where no matter what excuses you make, you can never take back what you've done!@k@vS08/37/320300426. Where you can't put things back the way they used to be!!"
"Where you're tormented by regret, and come to hate everything...@k@vS08/37/320300428. yet the pain never ends! Do you know thaaat?!"
"So what if they're pretty words?!@k@vS08/28/320500611. We don't want to look back on our memories on the day we die and feel the need to paint over them in black!"
"I won't let you say things like that when you haven't tried, or even thought about trying! I don't want to hear it from you!@k@vS08/28/320500611_2. Don't deny the hell that I've tasted!!"
...Why?
How could I hear that detective's voice... in a place like this?
I can see it all over the girl in front of me... It looks just like that detective's face back then!!

"How about it?@k@vS08/37/320300430. You don't know, do you?!@k@vS08/37/320300431. You couldn't possibly know!!@k@vS08/37/320300432. Because you just try to hide your mistakes and keep making more, playing it off each time!!@k@vS08/37/320300433. Just like right now!!"
"You kept taking loan after loan, and now that you can't pay them back you're trying to bankrupt yourself?!@k@vS08/37/320300435. Are you trying to get even by destroying all your debts?!"
"...Do you get it now!@k@vS08/37/320300437. I'm saying that your madness is all thanks to you avoiding your responsibilities!!!"
"Guu, uu, uwaaaaaaaa!!!"
Natsumi pushed forward. I continued using the crutches to parry her attacks, which would prove fatal if I wasn't careful.
Of course, I abstained from attacking her myself, as it would be far too risky... but I couldn't afford to say much to her either.
(Shit...! I'm starting to feel dizzy...!)
The blood loss was finally catching up to me. ...At this point, I might be stuck at this hospital a while longer.
Though, it might be wishful thinking to believe I'll survive this as long as I'm hospitalized.
"I'll kill you...!!@k@vS08/36/320100591. Just you! I'm definitely, absolutely, going to kill you!!"

"Fine, kill me if you want to!!@k@vS08/37/320300440. Then this will finally be over!!@k@vS08/37/320300441. In reality, you killed me a few days ago!!@k@vS08/37/320300442. An extra two days doesn't make a difference!!"
"Even so... what will you do after you kill me?!@k@vS08/37/320300444. Kill everyone you don't like? Drive them out of your world?!@k@vS08/37/320300445. How far will you go until you're satisfied?!"
"The happiness you're pursuing will leave you all alone in an empty world of darkness!!"
Natsumi was startled by that. Her shoulders suddenly drooped. Then, with her eyes open wide... for a moment, she stopped and loosened her grip.
...Hearing the word "alone" brought back memories.
I defied the mysterious voice echoing in my head that had been ordering me to "kill, kill" for a while now... and thought back to that time.
Back then... I was certainly alone.
My parents decided to transfer me without asking me what I wanted.

They forced me into some high school without giving me a say in the matter and justified it by saying, "It's close to home"... A place like a whole new world, where all my efforts until that point meant nothing.
The classwork was unreasonable. And the classmates had a completely different atmosphere.
No matter where I looked, or how I thought about it... I felt completely out of place, like I was the only one who stuck out.
...It was depressing.
It was hard. It was embarrassing. It felt empty. It was hard to breathe.
But despite all that... from that day forward, I worked hard every day.
I improved my grades... and even though I wasn't very good at dealing with other people, I managed to make some close friends.
Being forced to start over in a new place meant building everything up from scratch... and that overwhelmed me with a dark, oppressive despair.
...What could I do?
I was sick of it, I wanted things to get easier.
The cold looks the other kids gave me when I called out to them.
And the impatience and self-loathing I felt when I desperately tried to keep up with their conversations and respond appropriately...
If it meant going through all of that all over again... then I'd rather be alone.
Plus... if someone can once again reduce all my effort to nothing in the end, wouldn't it be better to not bother right from the start...?
...Just as I muttered all that to myself and was about to give up on everything... it happened.
"...Do you need any help, transfer student?"
"Ah, hello.@k@vS08/37/310300003. Nice weather we're having today."
...A girl suddenly came over to me and spoke in a friendly tone.
"...Pffft, hehhehheh!@k@vS08/37/310300005. Interesting, aren't you?"
When she called me "interesting"... I was truly happy.
That was the first time... anyone said I was interesting.
I always did my best to keep up with everyone... never thinking about what kind of person I wanted to be, myself...
"Let's start over. I'm Tamako Makimura.@k@vS08/38/310400016. I'm this class's Class President.@k@vS08/38/310400017. Nice to meet you, Kimiyoshi-san."
"I'm Chisato Saeki.@k@vS08/37/310300058. Nice to meet you~.♪"
And the moment they introduced themselves to me, when I thought we might be able to become friends...
I was relieved.
I was definitely... happy.
Right... That's right!
Honestly... I hated being alone... so much.
For the longest time... even before I got sick... I always wanted to have someone there for me.
But I was afraid of being betrayed... of losing them... so I lied to myself for so long.
That's why I was afraid to trust anything... And then...!

"Just like you, I lost myself to despair and refused to believe in anything.@k@vS08/28/320500988. I struggled alone, I suffered, and I questioned why things only happened to me. I hated everything in the world...!"

"But... but you know!@k@vS08/28/320500990. Not being able to believe in anything... is really painful.@k@vS08/28/320500991. The more I doubted the people around me, the more they stopped believing in me, and it kept driving them away.@k@vS08/28/320500992. ...Everyone!"
"That's why I felt alone. Lonely, scared, and sad...!@k@vS08/28/320500994. You think you can endure that, Natsumi-san?@k@vS08/28/320500995. I couldn't endure it, myself!"
Me too... I was just like that detective...!
Always... always unable to endure it.
Just the thought of being alone made me feel sad and terrified. ...So, even if it hurt, I had to push myself...!
But... it's already too late.
After everything that's happened... things will never go back to the way they were.
In that case... what can I do now?
After selfishly going in a rampage, destroying everything in my path... what else could I do...?!
Hesitation and indecision rose to Natsumi's agonized expression.
Once I saw that, I was convinced.
...It's still not too late! She hasn't fallen so far into the darkness that she can never come back!!
If that's the case, I'll call her back...!
Even if that's impossible... at the very least, I'll turn her around!!
"Natsumi... I understand how you feel!@k@vS08/37/320300448. ...But if you want to be happy so badly, why aren't you working harder for it?@k@vS08/37/320300449. Why aren't you trying your hardest?"
"You have the power to do it!!@k@vS08/37/320300451. Even though there are so many good things that I can't have no matter how much I want them!!@k@vS08/37/320300452. So, why not?!"
It may not have been very long.
But.
For the two of us... it felt as long as everything that'd happened between us up until now.
Then...
Finally... they broke loose.
A warm glow shined in Natsumi's cold eyes... and they began to fill with massive tears.
The timid look on Natsumi's face... looked completely different from the wicked expression she wore until a moment ago.
However... even though I had no basis to think so, I was confident that the face in front of me was Natsumi's real face.

"Even I've been... working hard all this time!@k@vS08/36/320100601. Enduring all kinds of things, and playing along and doing what others said... because I didn't want people to think I was crazy... that I was one of those dangerous criminals from Hinamizawa!!"
"...But, nobody would understand!!"

"They kept piling more and more baseless prejudices on me for their own amusement, driving me to the edge!!@k@vS08/36/320100604. ...It hurt!!@k@vS08/36/320100605. Honestly, it hurt so much, and yet...!!!"
"Natsumi..."
That... was the darkness the real Natsumi had been hiding all this time.
The sadness and inferiority complex... that triggered the accumulation of those dark emotions.
She hated being from a rural town near Hinamizawa, she hated thinking that she was inferior to kids from the city... and those thoughts haunted her far too often...
She was forced to suppress her wishes and aspirations... and she continued to endure it.
Right. ...She was always enduring something. ...And I'm sure she had been ever since she was a little girl.
Desperately trying to keep herself under control and fit in with her surroundings...
It couldn't simply be dismissed as her having no self-confidence.
Now I finally understood. ...This girl could no longer tell what was right.

Even when it came to schoolwork, her values, or her identity in the city... people kept telling her way too many different things... and so, she lost sight of her future, her aspirations... even who she was.
In all her efforts to figure out how to be "normal" like everyone else, she struggled and hesitated... And then, it broke her.
So... what she needed wasn't false kindness or consideration.

It was to have a serious talk with her about what she was doing and what she wanted to do, then acknowledge those things... and occasionally point out her flaws and correct them while guiding her to the goal she'd found...!
"Everyone... refused to help me...!!@k@vS08/36/320100607. Even though I asked for help so many times... Even though I wanted to be like everyone else!!"
"I no longer knew... what to do about Hinamizawa and my family...!!@k@vS08/36/320100609. ...So, I... couldn't think of a better way of dealing with all this!!"
I knew it. So, I need to step forward...!
Right now, she's not just looking for some superficial notion of friendship!!
The one thing Natsumi truly needs... is someone who can have a serious heart-to-heart with her, someone she can truly open her heart to... in other words, a true...!!
"Are you... really that stupid?!@k@vS08/37/320300456. If it was so painful, you should've stopped!!"
"If the alternative was thinking all by yourself, you really should've spoken up!!@k@vS08/37/320300456_2. That's what friends are for! That's what we're here for!!"
...The one thing Natsumi wanted most was for someone to simply acknowledge her existence.

A friend, no, a true companion who would tell her plain and simple that there was nothing wrong with thinking for herself, for hesitating, for having a will of her own that possessed the courage to make choices...!

"Besides, why are you keeping it all in?!@k@vS08/37/320300458. That's not what it means to give it everything you've got!!@k@vS08/37/320300459. You just gave up on your own and stopped right there, that's all!!"
"Natsumi... endurance is not effort!@k@vS08/37/320300461. Giving it all you've got means never letting your feelings waver!"
"Effort means persuading others and making them understand your own thoughts...@k@vS08/37/320300463. and making them a reality!!"
Yes... only now was I able to understand.
Finally... I finally understood.
The true nature of what I'd failed to do for Natsumi...
In a group, no one person can just talk about what they want nonstop.
However... even so, if you just hold yourself back, go along with what others want... and keep your own desires locked away, all that awaits you is suffering.
In that case... you have to persuade others.
If you let them know what you want... and understand what they want, then compromise, surely those wishes will become reality.
And... up until now, we haven't been doing that.
Instead, we've been afraid of hurting others... and afraid they'll hurt us... avoiding the problem.
But... it'll be different now.
To be a true friend, sometimes it's necessary to clash over your ideals.
You may fight in the process. And it may take a while before you're able to reach an understanding.
However... by doing so, you'll surely be able to resolve all your doubts, reservations, and misunderstandings.
Because friends who are able to share their true feelings become more precious than anything else...
"Natsumi..."
I tossed aside the crutches I had in my hands and walked over to Natsumi.
...Even if she went into another violent outburst... I didn't care.
"?! D-Don't come closer...!!"
"I... I've been doing wrong by you for so long.@k@vS08/37/320300465_1. I didn't understand you properly, nor could I help you..."

"...But, Natsumi.@k@vS08/37/320300467. That's true for both of us.@k@vS08/37/320300468. You didn't understand us at all either.@k@vS08/37/320300469. You never asked for help or relied on us.@k@vS08/37/320300470. So, I... won't apologize anymore.@k@vS08/37/320300471. ...However."
Saying that, I walked up right in front of Natsumi, still holding that kitchen knife, and turned straight towards her.

"In exchange... I'll face you properly from now on.@k@vS08/37/320300473. Then, I'll listen to your problems properly.@k@vS08/37/320300474. And in exchange, listen to my problems too, Natsumi.@k@vS08/37/320300475. ...Please."

"So, Natsumi... let's do our best together, one more time.@k@vS08/37/320300477. I swear... I won't screw up again.@k@vS08/37/320300478. I'll always be your friend, and I'll never stop believing in you."
"So, please... believe in me too.@k@vS08/37/320300480. Is that so unreasonable?"
The rage in Natsumi until a moment ago... began to diminish and her shoulders started to droop, then she faintly nodded to me.
Seeing her like that... I held my slashed and battered hand out to her, with all my might.
Nevertheless... Natsumi looked at me with tears in her eyes and a sad smile as she said that.
"I've already... killed so many of my loved ones...@k@vS08/36/320100621. Mom, Dad, Grandma... I don't know what I can do to atone for that..."
"And I've been losing myself more and more... My head's a complete mess..."
"I hate everyone... and I can't hold back this urge to kill...@k@vS08/36/320100624. ...I'm... so tired of it..."
If that's the case... there's only one answer.
What I couldn't do for Kaori back then... I'll do it now, without a moment of hesitation...
"In that case... I'll go with you.@k@vS08/37/320300484. I'll go... to hell and back, together with you."
"I'm sure that true friends...@k@vS08/37/320300486. are those who share their genuine feelings with each other, just like this."
"Even though it's probably not good to actually beat each other up.@k@vS08/37/320300487_1. Right now... I can say proudly, from the bottom of my heart, that you're my friend, Natsumi."
"Ch-Chisato-chan...!"

"Isn't it lonely, doing everything on your own?@k@vS08/37/320300489. Then, this should be all right.@k@vS08/37/320300490. You don't need to shoulder everything on your own any longer.@k@vS08/37/320300491. I'll go to hell with you.@k@vS08/37/320300492. I said this earlier, but... in reality, I actually died a few days ago, right?"
...Yeah. That's it, Natsumi.
You won't have to despair alone.
I failed just as much as you before this. If this is the result of that... then I'll gladly let karma have its way with me.
So... you don't have to keep blaming yourself so much.
If you want to reduce yourself to zero... I'll go with you.
In exchange... when we next see each other again, let's be sure to...
"Stop, Kimiyoshi!!"
"Natsumi-san!!"
When Akira, Akasaka, and Ooishi finally arrived, they found what looked like Chisato wrapped around Natsumi.
Time... came to a halt.
...Though the two of them were holding one another, they didn't move.
Akasaka, Ooishi, and Akira... were crushed by the regret that they couldn't stop this tragedy.
They just stared at the two of them... unable to even tremble.
However...
The knife fell from Natsumi's hands... and clattered along the ground.
On that dazzlingly bright blade... there were no traces of blood.
"...Natsumi...?"
"...Chisato...chan..."
Natsumi trembled as she slowly raised her head.
Her eyes, which were cloudy and empty until a while ago... began to glimmer and shine.
"I'm sorry... I'm sorry...@k@vS08/36/320100631. I remembered... I remembered...!"
Huge tears began overflowing down her face...
"...You've always been kind to me, Chisato-chan, ever since we first met.@k@vS08/36/320100633. You've always cared about me and looked out for me..."
...Why did I forget?
Why...? How could I think my precious friend hated me?
She threw everything away for me... even her own life.
Even as I fell into darkness and despair, she continued reaching out to me with no regard for the danger. She was my irreplaceable, best friend...!!
"Natsumi... You...?!"
"Even so...@k@vS08/36/320100635. there were so many things I was scared and anxious about, and I no longer knew what to believe in...!@k@vS08/36/320100636. I'm sorry, I'm sorry, I'm sorry...!!"
Natsumi pressed her face into Chisato's chest as more tears continued spilling out.
While looking at that... Chisato realized that her precious friend, who she loved so much, had finally returned to her.
"Natsumi...!!"
"Chisato-chan... uuu... uwaaaa...!!"
...Welcome back, Natsumi.
...I'm here, Chisato-chan.
The happiness the two of them shared blurred and mixed together.
The cry of the higurashi... echoed through the sunset sky.
Thinking of a friend... shows true kindness.
And trying to face your hardships head on... requires serious courage.
...It's not an easy thing to say.
And even then, there's no guarantee that it will all lead to the truth and happiness.
Even so.
A single heart, controlled by a deep darkness...
was illuminated with a strong light...
leaving that last step...
firmly in the present...
